blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 318 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
